query:
SELECT
            model AS "model!",
            COUNT(DISTINCT context_id)::bigint AS "conversations!",
            COUNT(*)::bigint AS "ai_requests!"
          FROM ai_requests
          WHERE user_id = $1
            AND context_id IS NOT NULL
            AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
          GROUP BY model
          ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
          LIMIT 5
